entity_groups.decision: Existing do-not-merge coverage proves these are distinct borough-scoped boards, so label disambiguation is safer than merging.
Existing do-not-merge coverage proves these are distinct project-scoped CACs, so label disambiguation is safer than merging.
Deferred. Existing do-not-merge says strong entity_type fields differ even though both represent Frank Farrell; needs a narrow person/title display-policy pass.

Deferred. Existing do-not-merge treats these parent-MTA-shaped records as separate current canonical records because prior parent-MTA aliases caused cycles; needs source-review or representation policy before relabeling.

implemented_changes.summary: Added record-aware entity display-name disambiguation after canonical merge and before source-date backfill. It only rewrites generic Community Board N labels when borough context is deterministic, and generic Community Advisory Committee labels when a payload description states 'Community Advisory Committee for the ... project'.
Added regression coverage for deterministic community-board and CAC display disambiguation.

changed_entity_labels.display_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay SBS Community Advisory Committee (CAC)
Webster Avenue SBS Community Advisory Committee (CAC)

next_lanes: Review the Frank Farrell pair for a narrow title-based display disambiguation policy versus a broader person/entity-type canonicalization repair.
Review the parent-MTA pair as a representation-policy issue before changing labels or merge status.
Continue metric tail repair for date-shaped rows via event/date representation rather than unit coercion.
